name: mermaid-gpt
description: Local Mermaid diagram renderer with chat-style UI and optional GPT enhancement

scripts.test:fast: node --test test/test-agent-api.js test/test-classifier.js test/test-enhanced-validation.js test/test-enhancer-bridge.js test/test-image-validation.js test/test-input-analyzer.js test/test-mermaid-repairer.js test/test-rate-master-bridge.js test/test-run-tracker.js test/test-structural-signature.js test/test-tla-compiler.js test/test-ts-compiler.js test/test-ts-validator.js test/test-perf-optimizations.js
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:fast && npm run test:compile
